name: Colosse Hydraulique
description: Mastodonte en exosquelette minier quadruple vérin. Ses bras mécaniques broient les fortifications tandis que son réservoir dorsal pulvérise un brouillard de plasma chaud.
prompt: Enormous alien cephalopod in oversized hydraulic mining exoskeleton, four massive pistons as limbs, rust orange heavy plating, giant spherical water-filled head dome, plasma sprayer backpack, steam clouds, brutal industrial sci-fi design
